title: Spotlight: Lark Funding – The Ultimate Refund Premiere
description: The curtain rises on Lark Funding's epic offer, allowing traders to reclaim their challenge fee and start their cinematic journey to success with confidence.
seo_content:
Lark Funding 100% Refundable Fee Deal

Lark Funding is offering a remarkable promotion for March 2026: a 100% challenge fee refund using code MARCH2026. This means that when you pass your Lark Funding challenge and receive your first payout, your original challenge fee will be refunded in full — making the evaluation effectively free for traders who successfully complete it. This is one of the strongest risk-reduction guarantees available in the prop trading space for March 2026.

Lark Funding is a Canadian proprietary trading firm with a well-established reputation for operational reliability and trader-friendly policies. The firm supports multiple evaluation models — both standard challenge and instant funding paths — and has built a community of funded traders across North America and internationally. Their commitment to transparent terms and consistent payouts has made them a trusted option for traders who want the security of a Canadian-regulated operational environment.

With code MARCH2026, your challenge fee becomes fully refundable upon passing and receiving your first payout. This structure removes the primary financial risk of a challenge evaluation: the fear of paying a fee, failing to pass, and losing your investment. With the refund guarantee in place, successful traders effectively trade for free, while even unsuccessful attempts can be restarted knowing a future pass will reclaim your costs.

Lark Funding's trading conditions are consistent with their standard challenge terms: defined profit targets, maximum drawdown limits, no time restrictions, and support for forex and CFD instruments. Payouts are processed through Lark Funding's verified payout channels, and the 100% refund is applied automatically to your first payout once all qualifying conditions are met. Review the specific refund eligibility terms on the Lark Funding site to confirm requirements.

To activate this March 2026 deal, visit Lark Funding through the affiliate link above, select your preferred challenge account, and enter MARCH2026 at checkout. The 100% fee refund will be tracked against your account automatically. This offer is valid through March 31, 2026 — purchase before the deadline to qualify for the full refund on your first payout.
